goal: Implement the approved 1-5 stabilization plan: keep hundred-plus card corpus, normalize battle mapping compatibility, unify card-detail asset loading, harden main menu chain baseline, and add lightweight regression checks.
constraints: Preserve the restored 100+ card corpus (current baseline 170 cards).
Do not remove in-flight unrelated files.
Keep gameplay behavior stable while improving compatibility and guardrails.
deliverables: Card corpus guard in showcase layer
Backward/forward compatible type mapping in battle conversion
CardDetail using shared asset resolver for image consistency
Main flow baseline hardening in App
New baseline validation script and npm command
